title: Goliath Arsenal
body:
# Goliath Arsenal

The weapons from arsenal are rather large; but what if they were bigger?
Introducing Goliath Arsenal! A pack that resizes the base arsenal weapons from clasic 32x32, to a gargantuan 48x48.

Within this pack are most of arsenal's weapons (and skins) sized up, the exeption being the folly tree branch, and the scisors, both of wich I have left small.

If you happen to find any problems; please send an email to Lime.imortal9@gmail.com containing the description of the issue, and how it can be replicated.

Also: for anyone wanting a custom pack made for them; also send a dm to Lime_void on the Imortals Packs discord with your specific suggestion, your reason (if you have one) and a colour pallet if you want, a size, a name (optional) and what mod (or base minecraft) it should be for within.

Immages will be posted soon.
